title: Thelypteris prolixa
taxonomy: Thelypteris prolixa belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as marsh ferns. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its morphological features. Thelypteris prolixa is further classified as a genus within the family, and its specific classification is Thelypteris prolixa (Spreng.) A.R. Sm. It is a species of fern that is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The classification of Thelypteris prolixa is subject to ongoing research and may be refined as new information becomes available.
